page.content: The market share by region for PepsiCo in the Food & Beverage sector from 2019 to 2024 reveals significant trends. In the UK, the market share started at 32% in 2019 with units sold recorded at 1.2M and a growth rate of 5%. The following year, 2020, the market share increased to 34%, with units sold rising to 1.4M and a growth rate of 6%. In 2021, the UK market share continued to grow to 36%, with units sold reaching 1.6M and a growth rate of 7%. By 2022, the market share further increased to 38%, with units sold at 1.8M and a growth rate of 8%. In 2023, the market share in the UK rose to 40%, with a total of 2.0M units sold and a growth rate of 9%.

lines.text: The market share by region for PepsiCo in the Food & Beverage sector from 2019 to 2024 reveals significant trends. In the UK,
the market share started at 32% in 2019 with units sold recorded at 1.2M and a growth rate of 5%. The following year, 2020, the
market share increased to 34%, with units sold rising to 1.4M and a growth rate of 6%. In 2021, the UK market share continued
to grow to 36%, with units sold reaching 1.6M and a growth rate of 7%. By 2022, the market share further increased to 38%,
with units sold at 1.8M and a growth rate of 8%. In 2023, the market share in the UK rose to 40%, with a total of 2.0M units
sold and a growth rate of 9%.

page.content: Finally, in 2024, the market share reached 42%, with units sold at 2.2M and a growth rate of 10%. In Germany, the market share was 20% in 2019, with units sold at 800K and a growth rate of 4%. In 2020, the market share increased to 22%, units sold rose to 850K, and the growth rate improved to 5%. The upward trend in Germany continued into 2021, where the market share reached 24%, with units sold at 900K and a growth rate of 6%. This data illustrates a consistent growth trajectory in both the UK and Germany, emphasizing the increasing market presence of PepsiCo in these regions over the specified period.
